subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-04-24
subcodes.first_line: What a wonderful meeting this is! These are the children of the Kingdom. The song we have just listened to... The art of music is divine and effective
subcodes.subjects: @music and singing, @fulfillment of true potential, @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @education of children; moral education, @differences in human capacity
